'''Pug jumpers''' were non-aggressive creatures with hard, spiked skin. They lived on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] and their tongues were appreciated by local traders.

{{Creature-stub}}

*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
